original_snippet_context: Discussing the loan raised by São Paulo for the coffee valorization plan and its connection to the proposed Caixa de Conversão, referencing the Convênio de Taubaté.
relevant_quote: "será applicado como lastro da caixa de conversão, que for creada pelo Congresso Nacional"
justification: This part simply states the intended use of the loan as backing for the Caixa, without expressing opinions about its implementation details or broader monetary impacts.
